testcase.name: testTwoNormalPlusOneWildViaAreaIsComplete

failure.message: 2 normal + 1 wild in ORANGE must count as 1 complete set ==> expected: <1> but was: <0>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 2 normal + 1 wild in ORANGE must count as 1 complete set ==> expected: <1> but was: <0> at
